headline: SoftBank Project Fee Slashed By Over 90% Amid Uncertainty Over $550 Billion US-Japan Trade Deal: Report
summary: The anticipated ¥1 trillion ($6.3 billion) fee for SoftBank from a U.S.-Japan project has been reduced by over 90% due to intervention from Tokyo officials amid growing concerns over the $550 billion joint investment plan between the U.S. and Japan.

headline: GE Vernova Refines Energy Focus As Proficy Joins Velotic AI Platform
summary: GE Vernova (NYSE:GEV) has completed the divestiture of its Proficy manufacturing software business to TPG. The assets are being combined under a new company, Velotic, positioned as a large independent industrial software platform. Velotic is expected to focus on AI and IoT capabilities for manufacturing clients following the closing of this transaction. For GE Vernova, which centers its operations on energy solutions, the exit from Proficy marks a clear separation between its industrial...
